title: helichrysum tomentosum
intro: Helichrysum tomentosum, also known as the woolly curry plant or ice plant, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small yellow flowers and woolly foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum tomentosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to alleviate digestive issues and soothe respiratory problems. Helichrysum tomentosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
